descriptions.elden: The Shadow of the Erdtree expansion features an all-new story set in the Land of Shadow imbued with mystery, perilous dungeons, and new enemies, weapons and equipment. Discover uncharted territories, face formidable adversaries, and revel in the satisfying triumph of victory.
descriptions.cyber: Live the ultimate power fantasy in Night City with the Phantom Liberty expansion. As the mercenary V, plunge into a world of cyber-crimes and politics in an intense, espionage-thriller adventure, now fully optimized for next-gen.
descriptions.fc: Build your dream squad in FC 25 with massive gameplay improvements and the all-new tactical system. Dominate the pitch with the world's best players and experience the most realistic football ever created.
descriptions.god: The Norse saga of Kratos and Atreus continues in the Nine Realms. With Ragnarök approaching, face gods and monsters in epic battles and a moving story about destiny and loyalty.
descriptions.wukong: Inspired by the classic Chinese novel 'Journey to the West', embark on a journey as 'The Chosen One' to encounter challenges and discover the truth behind a glorious legend from the past in a visually stunning Action RPG.
descriptions.ps10: PlayStation Store $10 Wallet Top-up. Valid for US accounts. Get instant access to buy games, add-ons, and more directly from the store.
descriptions.xbox20: Xbox Digital Gift Card $20. Valid for US accounts. Enjoy the latest games, Game Pass subscriptions, and exclusive content.
descriptions.steam50: Steam Wallet Code $50. Valid Globally. Add funds to your Steam account and enjoy thousands of games and seasonal sales.
